2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

770 INST - Information Studies

INST782 Arrangement, Description, and Access for Archives (3 Credits) Introduction to the key concepts and practices involved with arrangement and description of archives, and the techniques appropriate to enable users to access archival information in traditional and nontraditional archival contexts.
